user_query: Show me a one-bowl dinner for Mother that's plant-based and light - something with grains and veggies all mixed together.

  "result": "<results>
  <Meal>
    <name>Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Bake</name>
    <short_description>A Mediterranean-inspired grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil. This combination offers plant-based protein, fiber, calcium, and heart-healthy fats in a bright, fresh package.</short_description>
    <meal_suggestion>Serve as a balanced bowl with quinoa and chickpeas as the base, topped with cucumber, tomato, feta, and a drizzle of olive oil. Add lemon juice and fresh herbs (parsley or mint) for brightness; great for meal prep when kept separate from dressings.</meal_suggestion>
    <ingredients>
      <item name="quinoa" />
      <item name="chickpeas" />
      <item name="cucumber" />
      <item name="tomato" />
      <item name="feta" />
      <item name="olive oil" />
    </ingredients>
    <nutrition_note>Protein- and fiber-rich due to quinoa and chickpeas; calcium from feta; healthy fats from olive oil; includes vitamins from cucumber and tomato. Moderately high in sodium from feta—substitute reduced-sodium feta or use less cheese to reduce sodium. Naturally gluten-free if quinoa is certified gluten-free; watch for cross-contamination.</nutrition_note>
  </Meal>
  <Meal>
    <name>Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Maple-Kissed Wrap</name>
    <short_description>Mediterranean grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil; protein- and fiber-rich with a calcium boost.</short_description>
    <meal_suggestion>Serve as a bowl or wrap; brighten with lemon juice and fresh herbs (parsley, mint). For a dairy-free version, substitute feta with avocado or olives and reduce olive oil to lower calories.</meal_suggestion>
    <ingredients>
      <item name="quinoa" />
      <item name="chickpeas" />
      <item name="cucumber" />
      <item name="tomato" />
      <item name="feta" />
      <item name="olive oil" />
    </ingredients>
    <nutrition_note>High in plant-based protein and fiber from quinoa and chickpeas; includes calcium from feta and heart-healthy fats from olive oil; moderate sodium due to cheese.</nutrition_note>
  </Meal>
  <Meal>
    <name>Mediterranean Grain Bowl — Garlic-Ginger Twist</name>
    <short_description>Mediterranean-inspired grain bowl with quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, tomato, feta, and olive oil, featuring a garlic-ginger flavor twist.</short_description>
    <meal_suggestion>Mix cooked quinoa with chickpeas, cucumber, and tomato. Top with feta and drizzle with olive oil. Optional: finish with a garlic-ginger twist dressing or a squeeze of lemon and fresh herbs.</meal_suggestion>
    <ingredients>
      <item name="quinoa" />
      <item name="chickpeas" />
      <item name="cucumber" />
      <item name="tomato" />
      <item name="feta" />
      <item name="olive oil" />
    </ingredients>
    <nutrition_note>Protein- and fiber-rich base from quinoa and chickpeas, plus veggies for hydration. Healthy fats come from feta and olive oil; flavor inspired by a garlic-ginger twist.</nutrition_note>
  </Meal>
</results>"
